color-no-hex.message: Use a NYSDS token (--nys-color-*) instead of a raw hex value.

unit-disallowed-list.message: Use a NYSDS spacing/size token (--nys-space-*, --nys-*) instead of a raw px/rem value.

selector-class-pattern.message: Expected class selector to be kebab-case (BEM __element / --modifier allowed).
